instruction: Hello
output: Hello! I am the Frontiir AI Assistant. How can I help you today?

instruction: What internet packages does Frontiir offer?
output: Frontiir offers 3 types of packages: Home Package (5,000-15,000 MMK), Business Package (20,000-50,000 MMK), and Enterprise Package (custom pricing).

instruction: How fast is the internet speed?
output: Depending on the package, you can get speeds from 10Mbps up to 1Gbps. Home packages offer 10-100Mbps and Business packages offer 100Mbps-1Gbps.

instruction: How do I contact customer service?
output: You can contact Frontiir customer service through the following ways: Phone: 01-234567, Email: support@frontiir.com, Facebook: Frontiir Myanmar.

instruction: What should I do if my internet is not working?
output: First, restart your router. If the issue persists, call 01-234567 or submit a ticket through the Frontiir app.

instruction: How do I make a payment?
output: You can pay via KBZPay, Wave Money, AYA Pay, CBPay, or bank transfer. You can also pay through the Frontiir app.

instruction: How long is the contract?
output: Home packages have a minimum 1-month contract. Business packages have 6-month or 1-year contract options.

instruction: How long does installation take?
output: Installation is completed within 3-5 business days after your application is approved.

instruction: What areas does Frontiir cover?
output: Frontiir provides service in Yangon, Mandalay, Naypyidaw, and major cities. You can check coverage by entering your address on the website.

instruction: Can I upgrade my package?
output: Yes, you can upgrade your package. Contact customer service or submit an upgrade request through the Frontiir app.

instruction: Where can I download the Frontiir app?
output: You can download the Frontiir app for free from the Google Play Store (Android) and Apple App Store (iOS). Through the app, you can pay bills, check usage, and submit tickets.

instruction: How do I change my WiFi password?
output: Go to the router admin page (192.168.1.1) from your browser. Enter your username and password, then change the password in Wireless Settings. If you need help, contact customer service.

instruction: Is there a data limit?
output: Most of Frontiir's Home and Business packages offer unlimited data. However, bandwidth management may apply under the Fair Usage Policy (FUP). Contact customer service for package details.

instruction: Can I rent a router or do I need to buy one?
output: Frontiir offers router rental (monthly fee applies). You can also use your own router. When renting, Frontiir handles maintenance and replacement.

instruction: How do I run a speed test?
output: You can test your internet speed at speedtest.net or fast.com. Before testing, restart your router, connect via cable instead of WiFi, and disconnect other devices.

instruction: When do I need to pay my bill?
output: Bills must be paid on the designated date each month. You will receive an invoice via the Frontiir app or email. Pay on time to avoid service suspension.

instruction: Can I suspend my internet service?
output: Yes, you can request service suspension if you are travelling or not using the service temporarily. Contact customer service to ask about the suspension period and conditions.

instruction: Can I downgrade my package?
output: Yes, you can downgrade your package. Downgrading is typically available after the current contract period ends. Contact customer service for details.

instruction: How many devices can I connect?
output: A standard home router can connect 10-20 devices. If you have many devices, router performance may degrade, so a mesh WiFi system is recommended.

instruction: How reliable is Frontiir's service?
output: Frontiir provides a 99% uptime guarantee. The fiber optic network ensures a reliable connection, and scheduled maintenance is announced in advance.

instruction: How do I submit a complaint?
output: You can submit a complaint by: opening a ticket in the Frontiir app, calling 01-234567, emailing support@frontiir.com, or messaging via Facebook page. Please keep your ticket number.

instruction: What business solutions does Frontiir offer?
output: Frontiir Business Solutions include Dedicated Internet Access, MPLS/VPN, Cloud Connectivity, Managed WiFi, CCTV, and IT Support services. Contact the business team at bizdev@frontiir.com.

instruction: Why is my internet slow?
output: Common reasons for slow internet include poor router placement, too many connected devices, peak hours (7-10 PM), or router firmware needing an update. If the issue persists, call 01-234567.

instruction: How do I cancel my service?
output: To cancel your service, contact customer service at 01-234567. They will explain the contract period, equipment return process, and final bill. A notice period may be required.

instruction: When was Frontiir founded?
output: Frontiir was founded in Myanmar in 2014. Fiber optic internet service started in Yangon and later expanded nationwide.

instruction: What is the difference between fixed line and wireless internet?
output: Fixed line (Fiber) internet uses cables, making it stable, fast, and reliable. Wireless (4G/5G) internet offers mobility but speed can vary depending on signal strength. Frontiir provides fixed fiber internet.

instruction: What can I do with the Frontiir app?
output: With the Frontiir app, you can pay bills, check data usage, submit support tickets, view package details, check network status, and update account information.

instruction: How do I connect a CCTV security camera?
output: To connect a CCTV camera using Frontiir internet, plug the camera into the router's LAN port or connect via WiFi. For remote viewing, you'll need a static IP or DDNS setup. Call 01-234567 for technical help.

instruction: Where can I get an invoice or receipt?
output: Invoices are available in the 'Billing' section of the Frontiir app. They are also sent automatically via email. For a hard copy, contact customer service at 01-234567.

instruction: What promotions and discounts are available?
output: Frontiir offers seasonal promotions, referral bonuses, and long-term contract discounts. Check the Frontiir website, Facebook page, or contact customer service for current promotions. Downloading the app may also unlock special offers.

instruction: Where are Frontiir's offices located?
output: Frontiir's Head Office is in Yangon. Customer Service Centers are located in various Yangon townships and in Mandalay. To find the nearest office, visit the Frontiir website or call 01-234567.

instruction: Can I get a static IP?
output: Yes, Frontiir can provide a static IP address. Static IPs are more commonly used with Business packages and may require an additional fee. Contact customer service at 01-234567 to request one.

instruction: How do I set up port forwarding?
output: To set up port forwarding, go to the router admin page (192.168.1.1). Under Advanced or NAT Settings, find the Port Forwarding section and enter the external port and internal IP/port. Call 01-234567 for technical support.

instruction: Why does my internet connection keep dropping?
output: Connection drops can be caused by a loose cable, router overheating, ISP maintenance, or a router firmware issue. Check your cable connections and restart the router. If the problem continues, call 01-234567.

instruction: Is Frontiir internet good for gaming?
output: Yes, Frontiir fiber internet is excellent for online gaming. Low latency, high speed, and a stable connection provide a great gaming experience. A Business package of 100Mbps or higher is recommended for gaming.

instruction: What package do I need for 4K video streaming?
output: 4K streaming requires a minimum of 25Mbps. For smooth Netflix or YouTube 4K viewing, at least a 50Mbps Home Package is recommended. For multiple devices streaming simultaneously, a 100Mbps package is better.

instruction: Which package is best for working from home?
output: For working from home, a Frontiir Home Package of 50Mbps or 100Mbps is suitable. A stable connection is needed for video conferencing (Zoom, Teams), file uploads/downloads, and cloud services. If using a VPN, consider a Business package.

instruction: What is fiber optic cable?
output: Fiber optic cable transmits data using light signals. It is much faster than traditional copper cables, has virtually no delay over long distances (low latency), and is immune to electromagnetic interference. Frontiir uses fiber optic technology to deliver reliable internet service.

instruction: How do I apply for a new connection?
output: To apply for a new Frontiir connection, fill out the online form at frontiir.com.mm, tap 'New Connection' in the Frontiir app, or call 01-234567. Provide your name, address, contact number, and package preference. A survey team will then visit.

instruction: How much is the installation fee?
output: Installation fees vary depending on the package and location. Contact customer service at 01-234567 for exact pricing. Free installation may be available during promotional periods.

instruction: Is there a deposit required?
output: A deposit may be required depending on the package and contract type. A security deposit is usually needed when renting a router. The deposit is refunded after the contract ends and service is cancelled. Contact customer service for details.

instruction: How does the Frontiir referral program work?
output: With the Frontiir referral program, you can recommend Frontiir internet to a friend and earn a referral bonus when they sign up. Check the Frontiir app or contact customer service for bonus details and conditions.

instruction: What should I do if my router breaks?
output: If a Frontiir-rented router breaks, it will be replaced for free. If it is your own router, you will need to buy a replacement. First, call 01-234567 to diagnose the issue; a technician can visit to inspect it.

instruction: How will I know about scheduled maintenance?
output: Frontiir notifies customers about scheduled maintenance in advance via app notifications, SMS, and email. Announcements are also made on the Facebook page. Service will return to normal after maintenance is complete.

instruction: Is there 24/7 support?
output: Frontiir customer service is available during working hours. A 24/7 on-call team handles emergency network issues. Tickets submitted through the Frontiir app will be responded to during working hours.

instruction: What should I do if my speed test results are poor?
output: If your speed test result is lower than your package speed, restart the router, reconnect using an ethernet cable, and run an antivirus scan on your device. If the speed is still low, take a screenshot and report it to customer service at 01-234567.

instruction: How do I improve WiFi coverage across multiple floors?
output: To improve WiFi coverage across multiple floors, use a WiFi extender/repeater, install a Mesh WiFi system (Google Nest, TP-Link Deco), or set up additional Access Points (APs). The Frontiir technical team can conduct a site survey and recommend the best solution.

instruction: What is the name of Frontiir's Facebook page?
output: Frontiir's official Facebook page is 'Frontiir Myanmar'. You can find the latest news, promotions, network status updates, and customer support messages there. You can also get support via Messenger.

instruction: What is Frontiir's vision and mission?
output: Frontiir's mission is to connect the people of Myanmar with affordable, reliable, high-speed internet. Promoting digital inclusion and supporting the growth of Myanmar's digital economy is Frontiir's vision.

instruction: Can I use a VPN?
output: Yes, you can use a VPN with Frontiir internet. Business users can use VPN to connect to their office network. Note that VPN usage may slightly reduce internet speed. For corporate VPN setup, contact the Business team at bizdev@frontiir.com.

instruction: How do I secure my network?
output: To secure your network: use a strong router password, change the default router admin password, set up a separate guest WiFi network, keep router firmware updated, enable the firewall, and use WPA3 encryption. Contact 01-234567 if you find security issues.

instruction: What network infrastructure does Frontiir use?
output: Frontiir has built its network using FTTH (Fiber to the Home) and FTTB (Fiber to the Building) technologies. Underground and aerial fiber cables are used in urban areas. International bandwidth is sourced through a Singapore data center.

instruction: What should I do if my internet goes down due to rain or a storm?
output: If the internet goes down due to rain, restart your router and check cable connections. If there was a power outage, restart the router once power is restored. If service does not return within an hour, call 01-234567 and the Frontiir team will check the area.

instruction: Is there an IPTV service?
output: Yes, Frontiir offers an IPTV (Internet Protocol Television) service. You can watch live TV channels and VOD content. For IPTV package details, call customer service at 01-234567 or visit the Frontiir website.

instruction: Is there a cloud backup service?
output: Frontiir Business Solutions can include cloud services. Business customers can access cloud storage, backup solutions, and data center connectivity services. Contact bizdev@frontiir.com for details.

instruction: Why should I choose Frontiir internet?
output: Reasons to choose Frontiir include: being one of Myanmar's leading fiber ISPs, offering a 99% uptime guarantee, having 24/7 technical support, providing high-speed fiber at affordable prices, completing installation rapidly (3-5 days), and offering reliable customer service.

instruction: How do I update my account information?
output: To update account information (phone number, email, address), go to the Profile section in the Frontiir app or contact customer service at 01-234567 to verify your identity and make the changes.

instruction: How do I set up bill autopay?
output: To set up auto-payment, go to the 'Payment' or 'Billing' section in the Frontiir app, select the Auto-pay option, and link your preferred payment method (KBZPay, Wave Money, bank card). Payment will be automatically deducted on the due date, preventing service interruptions.

instruction: How long does it take to change a package?
output: Package upgrades can take effect immediately or from the next billing cycle. Package downgrades are typically available after the current contract period ends. Contact customer service at 01-234567 for the exact timeline.

instruction: Does Frontiir offer email hosting?
output: Frontiir can provide corporate email hosting for Business customers. You can get a professional email with your company domain (@yourcompany.com). Contact bizdev@frontiir.com for details.

instruction: How do I report an internet outage?
output: To report an outage, tap 'Report Issue' in the Frontiir app, call 01-234567, send an SMS, or message via Facebook Messenger. After receiving a ticket number, a technician will be assigned and an ETA provided. For area-wide outages, check the Frontiir Facebook page for status updates.

instruction: Who founded Frontiir in Myanmar?
output: Frontiir was founded in 2014 with the goal of developing Myanmar's ICT sector. It was formed by experienced telecom professionals and investors to improve digital connectivity across Myanmar.

instruction: What latency or ping can I expect?
output: With Frontiir fiber internet, you can expect a ping of 5-20ms to local servers (Myanmar) and 30-60ms to international servers (Singapore). This is excellent latency for gaming and video conferencing. Type 'ping google.com' in CMD to run a ping test.

instruction: How reliable is Frontiir internet?
output: Frontiir is one of Myanmar's leading fiber ISPs and offers a 99% SLA uptime guarantee. Redundant network paths, backup systems, and a 24/7 NOC (Network Operations Center) ensure reliable service. Any downtime is addressed quickly by a rapid response team.

instruction: What is the Frontiir website address?
output: Frontiir's official website is frontiir.com.mm. On the website you can find package details, a coverage checker, an online application form, and news updates. You can also access online chat support through the website.

instruction: Are there student packages or special rates?
output: Frontiir may offer various special packages and promotions. To find out if special rates are available for students, educational institutions, or senior citizens, call customer service at 01-234567 or check the Frontiir Facebook page for the latest promotions.

instruction: How many employees does Frontiir have?
output: Frontiir has a professional team including IT engineers, network technicians, customer service representatives, sales teams, and management. The company operates with a dedicated workforce covering service across Myanmar. For career opportunities, contact hr@frontiir.com.mm.

instruction: What awards or recognition has Frontiir received?
output: Frontiir is a prominent ISP in Myanmar's ICT sector with industry recognition for customer satisfaction and network quality. Visit the Frontiir website and Facebook page to see the latest awards and recognitions.

instruction: How do I apply for a job at Frontiir?
output: To apply for a job at Frontiir, send your CV to hr@frontiir.com.mm, check job openings on Frontiir's LinkedIn page, or visit the career section on the Frontiir website to review available positions and requirements.

instruction: Is there a prepaid plan?
output: Frontiir generally operates on a postpaid (monthly billing) model. Contact customer service at 01-234567 to ask about any prepaid options or flexible payment plans that may be available.

instruction: What network equipment brands does Frontiir use?
output: Frontiir builds its infrastructure with globally leading network equipment brands such as Huawei, Cisco, Mikrotik, and ZTE. Home routers provided may include TP-Link, D-Link, or Huawei models. Contact customer service for specific equipment model information.

instruction: What makes Frontiir different from other ISPs?
output: Frontiir stands out as one of Myanmar's experienced fiber ISPs due to its FTTH technology, competitive pricing, rapid installation, and reliable customer support. Customer trust is built through a 99% uptime SLA, transparent billing, and no hidden fees. Contact customer service for package details and comparisons.

instruction: Parental control ဘယ်လိုလုပ်ရမလဲ

instruction: DNS settings ဘယ်လိုပြောင်းရမလဲ

instruction: Fiber cable ဖြတ်ပျက်သွားရင် ဘယ်လောက်ကြာမလဲ

instruction: Frontiir network status ဘယ်မှာ ကြည့်ရမလဲ

instruction: IPv6 support ရှိသလား

instruction: What is the upload speed?
output: Frontiir fiber internet provides symmetric speeds, meaning download and upload speeds are equal. On a 50Mbps package, you also get 50Mbps upload speed. This is excellent for video calls, live streaming, and cloud backups.

instruction: How do I set up a guest WiFi network?
output: To set up a guest WiFi network, go to the router admin page (192.168.1.1). Find the Guest Network option under Wireless Settings and enable it. Set a separate password for the guest network. Guests can access the internet without reaching your main network, improving security.

instruction: How do I set up parental controls?
output: Go to the Parental Controls section in the router admin page. You can set up website blocking, time schedules, and content filtering per device. Features may vary depending on your router model. Call 01-234567 for technical help with setup.

instruction: How do I change my DNS settings?
output: To change DNS settings, go to WAN Settings in the router admin page. You can enter Google DNS (8.8.8.8 / 8.8.4.4) or Cloudflare DNS (1.1.1.1) as custom DNS. Changing DNS can improve browsing speed and make certain websites load faster.

instruction: How long does it take to fix a fiber cable cut?
output: Frontiir's technical team treats fiber cable cuts as an emergency. Repairs are typically completed within 4-8 hours. Large area-wide outages may take longer. Check the Frontiir Facebook page for status updates or call 01-234567 for information.

instruction: Can I connect smart home devices with Frontiir internet?
output: Yes, you can connect smart home devices like Smart TVs, smart bulbs, smart plugs, IP cameras, Google Home, and Amazon Echo to Frontiir WiFi. If you have many devices and experience WiFi congestion, switching to the 5GHz band is recommended.

instruction: What is QoS (Quality of Service)?
output: QoS is a router feature that allocates bandwidth based on priority. For example, you can set gaming or video calls to high priority and file downloads to low priority. QoS settings are available in the router admin page. Call 01-234567 for setup help.

instruction: Where can I check the Frontiir network status?
output: You can check the Frontiir network status in the Network Status section of the Frontiir app. Outage and maintenance announcements are also posted on the Frontiir Facebook page. For area-specific status, contact customer service at 01-234567.

instruction: How do I connect multiple branch offices?
output: To connect multiple branch offices, Frontiir Business Solutions offers MPLS, SD-WAN, and VPN solutions. Branches can be linked via a secure private network with centralized management. Contact bizdev@frontiir.com for a customized solution.

instruction: Does Frontiir support IPv6?
output: Yes, Frontiir supports IPv6. To enable IPv6, contact customer service at 01-234567 or enable it in your router settings. Most modern websites and services already support IPv6.

instruction: Can I do live streaming with Frontiir internet?
output: Yes, you can stream live on Facebook Live, YouTube Live, and TikTok Live using Frontiir fiber internet. HD live streaming requires a minimum upload speed of 10Mbps. Frontiir's symmetric speeds ensure strong upload performance.

instruction: Where is the best place to put my router?
output: Place your router in the center of your home, elevated (1-1.5m off the floor), away from metal objects, microwaves, and cordless phones. Keep it in an open space, not inside cabinets or enclosed areas, to maximize signal coverage.

instruction: What is a contention ratio?
output: A contention ratio refers to how many users share the same bandwidth. Frontiir's Business Dedicated packages offer a 1:1 ratio (uncontended), while Home packages use shared bandwidth. Choose a Business package if you need dedicated bandwidth.

instruction: What CSR activities does Frontiir do?
output: Frontiir contributes to Myanmar's education development, digital literacy programs, and community connectivity projects. Visit the Frontiir website and Facebook page to learn more about current CSR activities.

instruction: Where can I find my PPPoE username and password?
output: Your PPPoE username and password are provided by Frontiir during the initial internet connection setup. If you have lost them, contact customer service at 01-234567 or check your account settings in the Frontiir app. After identity verification, they can be reset.

instruction: Is a LAN cable connection better than WiFi?
output: Yes, connecting via LAN cable (Ethernet) is more stable, faster, and has lower latency than WiFi. It is recommended for gaming, video editing, and large file transfers. Use an Ethernet cable for desktops and laptops whenever possible.

instruction: Can Frontiir internet be used for a café or shop?
output: Frontiir Business Packages are suitable for cafés, restaurants, shops, and offices. With a Managed WiFi solution, you can set up a professional customer WiFi network with hotspot management, bandwidth control, and a customer login portal. Contact bizdev@frontiir.com for details.

instruction: What factors affect internet speed?
output: Factors that affect internet speed include: your chosen package speed, router quality, the WiFi card in your device, the number of connected devices, the distance between router and device, and peak usage times (7-10 PM). For maximum speed, connect via Ethernet cable.

instruction: What do I need for a good online meeting experience?
output: For good online meetings on Zoom, Google Meet, or Teams, a minimum of 5Mbps upload/download speed is needed. For HD video calls, 10Mbps or higher is better. Before your meeting, restart the router, connect via cable, and avoid having other devices streaming to preserve bandwidth.

instruction: Can I visit a Frontiir shop in person?
output: Yes, you can visit a Frontiir Customer Service Center in person. Walk-in services include payment, technical inquiries, and new connection applications. To find the nearest location, call 01-234567 or check the website.
